---
title: ""
pagetitle: "About — Seth Watts"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-hero-slim">
  <p class="hero-affiliation" style="margin-bottom:0.5rem;">About</p>
  <h1 style="font-size:2.75rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-0.04em;margin:0 0 0.5rem;">Seth Watts, PhD</h1>
  <p style="color:var(--color-text-2);margin:0;">Assistant Professor of Criminal Justice &amp; Criminology at Texas State University.</p>
</div>
```

::::: about-grid
::: about-main
## Research

My work centers on policing, technological innovation, and public health — three domains that increasingly converge as law enforcement agencies adopt new tools and face growing demands for behavioral change.

I study how emerging technologies reshape day-to-day police practice. A significant portion of my research examines **body-worn cameras**: how automated AI-assisted review changes supervisor behavior, officer accountability, and officer acceptance of monitoring systems.

A second thread of my research addresses **de-escalation training** — what it is, what works, and why. This line of work has direct policy relevance as departments face pressure to reduce use-of-force incidents and improve officer-community relationships.

My public health work examines **police responses to opioid overdoses and co-response models**, focusing on how structural arrangements between law enforcement and public health agencies shape outcomes for individuals in crisis.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Education

```{=html}
<div class="edu-item">
  <p class="edu-degree">PhD, Criminology &amp; Criminal Justice</p>
  <p class="edu-institution">Arizona State University</p>
  <p class="edu-year">2024</p>
</div>
<div class="edu-item">
  <p class="edu-degree">MS, Criminology &amp; Criminal Justice</p>
  <p class="edu-institution">Arizona State University</p>
  <p class="edu-year">2021</p>
</div>
<div class="edu-item">
  <p class="edu-degree">BA, Psychology</p>
  <p class="edu-institution">Bowling Green State University</p>
  <p class="edu-year">2019</p>
</div>
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Academic Positions

**Assistant Professor**, School of Criminal Justice and Criminology Texas State University · 2025 – present

**Research Affiliate**, Texas Crime & Justice Center Texas State University · 2025 – present

**Postdoctoral Researcher**, Center for Violence Prevention & Community Safety Arizona State University · 2024 – 2025
:::

::: about-sidebar
```{=html}
<div class="contact-card">
  <h4>Contact &amp; Links</h4>

  <div class="contact-item">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i>
    <div><a href="mailto:sbwatts@txstate.edu">sbwatts@txstate.edu</a></div>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-item">
    <i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i>
    <div><a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_zgKKS0AAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank">Google Scholar</a></div>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-item">
    <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
    <div><a href="https://github.com/sBwatts" target="_blank">github.com/sBwatts</a></div>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-item">
    <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
    <div><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sethwatts1/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a></div>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-item">
    <i class="bi bi-twitter-x"></i>
    <div><a href="https://x.com/SethBWatts" target="_blank">@SethBWatts</a></div>
  </div>

  <div class="contact-item">
    <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
    <div style="font-size:0.875rem;">ORCID: <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5108-9055" target="_blank">0000-0002-5108-9055</a></div>
  </div>

  <hr style="margin:1.25rem 0;border-color:var(--color-border);">

  <div class="contact-item">
    <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
    <div style="font-size:0.875rem;color:var(--color-text-2);">
      School of Criminal Justice &amp; Criminology<br>
      Texas State University<br>
      San Marcos, TX 78666
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr style="margin:1.25rem 0;border-color:var(--color-border);">

  <a href="cv/cv.pdf" class="btn-primary-custom" target="_blank"
     style="width:100%;justify-content:center;font-size:0.85rem;display:inline-flex;">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person"></i>&nbsp; Download CV
  </a>
</div>
```
:::
:::::
